_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular Diagnosis of Neurofibromatosis by Multigene Panel Testing.

_contextSnippet: RCM and dermoscopy could provide new ways to help diagnose CALMs, which were used as supplementary diagnostic criteria for NF1. The results of the RCM and dermoscopy examination showed pigmentation changes, supporting the observed CALMs.
details: Dermoscopy examination showed pigmentation changes supporting CALM diagnosis and was used as supplementary diagnostic criteria for NF1
